# PERF-209 positive: Cobra PersistentPreRunE on a parent command
lang: go
file: PERF-209-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/spf13/cobra"
)

var RootCmd = &cobra.Command{
	Use:   "mytool",
	Short: "mytool does things",
	PersistentPreRunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
		// This runs for every subcommand.
		return connectDatabase()
	},
}

func connectDatabase() error { return nil }
